rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» – 6 стихир ап. Слава: ап., І нині: богородичний-догмат за гласом «Слава». Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання ап.: 1 Пт. 1:1-25,2:1-6, 1 Пт. 2:21-25,3:1-9, 1 Пт. 4:1-11. Стиховня - ап., зі своїми приспівами. Тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Утреня: по „Бог Господь”: тропар ап. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних, за гласом тропаря ап. Катизми чергові з сідальними ап., також Полієлей з величанням і сідальний ап. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен, Єв. Ів. зач. 67; 21, 15-25. Пс. 50, і стихира ап. Канон Богородиці і ап. Катавасія чергова - «Відкрию уста мої» По 3-ій пісні – сідальний ап. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос ап. По 9-ій – світильний ап. Хвалитні стихири ап. – 4, Слава: ап., І нині: богород., за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак ап.
Літургія: вся Служба – тільки ап. Апостол і євангелія спочатку дня, а потім ап. Ряд.: Ап. – 1 Тим. 278 зач.; 1, 1-7. Єв. – Лк. 75 зач.; 14, 12-15. Ап.: Ап. – 1 Кор. 131 зач.; 4, 9-16. Єв. – Мт. 30 зач.; 9, 9-13.

troparion_en.text: With zeal, you followed Christ the Master, / who in His goodness, appeared on earth to mankind. / Summoning you from the custom house, / He revealed you as a chosen apostle: / the proclaimer of the Gospel to the whole world! / Therefore, divinely eloquent Matthew, / we honor your precious memory! / Entreat merciful God that He may grant our souls remission of transgressions.

kontakion_en.text: Casting aside the bonds of the custom house for the yoke of justice, / you were revealed as an excellent merchant, rich in wisdom from on high. / You proclaimed the word of truth / and roused the souls of the slothful / by writing of the hour of Judgment.

troparion.text: With zeal, you followed Christ the Master, / who in His goodness, appeared on earth to mankind. / Summoning you from the custom house, / He revealed you as a chosen apostle: / the proclaimer of the Gospel to the whole world! / Therefore, divinely eloquent Matthew, / we honor your precious memory! / Entreat merciful God that He may grant our souls remission of transgressions.

kontakion.text: Casting aside the bonds of the custom house for the yoke of justice, / you were revealed as an excellent merchant, rich in wisdom from on high. / You proclaimed the word of truth / and roused the souls of the slothful / by writing of the hour of Judgment.

oca_saints.name: Saint Fulvian (in Baptism Matthew), Prince of Ethiopia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Fulvianus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

In you the image was preserved with exactness, O Father,  / for taking up your cross, you followed after Christ.  / By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away,  / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal.  / Therefore, most venerable Father Sergius your spirit rejoices with the Angels.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
Having divinely armed yourself with the purity of your soul,  / and firmly grasping unceasing prayer as a spear, you pierced the armies of demons.  / O our Father Sergius, pray unceasingly for us all.

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, / you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Hypatius, entreat Christ God to save our souls.
